privileged_info_summary: The task requires building a compositor node network in Blender 4.2.4 LTS on the BMW27.blend demo scene. The starting state has Cycles at 128 samples (agent must reduce to 64), 1920x1080 resolution, all render passes disabled, mist Start=0/Depth=0, and a clean compositor with only Render Layers -> Composite. The agent must: reduce samples to 64, enable AO and Mist passes, set Mist Start ~5.0m and Depth ~25.0m, build a compositing pipeline with Glare (FOG_GLOW type, threshold ~0.8, size ~7), Color Balance (warm Gain R>B, cool Lift B>R), Map Value (Size ~0.35) on the Mist pass, and Mix Color blending with a blue-grey fog color (B channel > R and G), route output to both Composite and File Output node pointing to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_composited.png, and render and save as composited_pipeline.blend. The verifier uses range-based checks: Glare threshold [0.6-1.0], size [5-9]; Map Value Size [0.2-0.5]; Color Balance Gain R>B for warm, Lift B>R for cool; Mix Color2 B>R and B>G for blue-grey. Pass threshold is 70/100 points. The BMW27.blend scene contains a car model with camera and lighting already set up. The BMW scene workspace layout is custom (not standard Blender defaults) so the agent must navigate to the Compositing context on its own.
